message:
feat(gateway): implement CheckpointService and context rotation

Implements Agent Lifecycle Management (flywheel_private-170):

CheckpointService:
- Create/restore/verify/export/import checkpoints
- Delta checkpoint support for efficient storage
- Checkpoint pruning and cleanup
- Hash-based integrity verification

Context Rotation:
- Four rotation strategies: summarize_and_continue, fresh_start,
  checkpoint_and_restart, graceful_handoff
- Context health monitoring (healthy/warning/critical/emergency)
- Configurable thresholds per agent
- Auto-rotation on emergency context levels

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
